title: Silkier Touch
description: ⛏️✨ Extends Silk Touch functionality! Dragon eggs, spawners, cake, farmland and more!
body:
Silkier Touch extends the functionality of the silk touch enchantment. Each feature can be toggled on or off in the config. You'll be able to pick up items such as Spawners, Dragon Eggs, Cake (that hasn't been eaten), Infested Stone and more!

See the full feature list in the config settings below.








   All available config options:

Show Spoiler

enableDragonEggDrop  default true
Disables the dragon egg teleport functionality when using a silk touch pickaxe.

enableSpawnerDrop  default true
Enables monster spawners to drop with silk touch. It keeps the mob data.

enableTrialSpawnerDrop  default false
Lowers the trial spawner 'strength' to allow breaking it. Will be dropped with silk touch on a pickaxe. Changing this requires a reboot.

enableFullCakeDrop  default true
Allows cakes that haven't been eaten from to drop with silk touch. Works with candle cakes as well.

enableBuddedAmethystDrop  default true
Allows Budded Amethyst to drop when mined with silk touch.

enableFarmlandDrop  default true
Allows Farmland to drop when harvested with silk touch.

enableTallGrassDrop  default true
Allows Tall Grass to drop when harvested with silk touch.

enableSnowLayerDrop  default true
Allows Snow Layers to drop when harvested with silk touch.

enableVinesDrop  default true
Allows Vines to drop when harvested with silk touch.

enableInfestedStoneDrop  default false
Allows Infested Stone to drop when mined with silk touch.




All mined with the Silk Touch enchant:

Monster Spawners:
Trial Spawners are disabled by default:

Show Spoiler

 
Cakes, with or without candles, and snow layers:

The dragon egg won't teleport:

You may freely use this mod in any modpack, as long as the download remains hosted within the CurseForge or Modrinth ecosystem.

Serilum.com contains an overview and more information on all mods available.

For issues, ideas, suggestions or anything else there is the Github repo. Thanks!
